introSection: Grand Huit was a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari that was previously located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.
fullText: Grand Huit was a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari that was previously located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.
